transcript.speaker: Sarah
transcript.text: Alright everyone, the goal today is to lock down our Q2 priorities. We have twelve candidate features and we can realistically ship four.

transcript.speaker: Mike
transcript.text: From engineering, the onboarding flow refactor is the highest ROI. It directly unblocks new user activation.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Design agrees. We already have the onboarding mockups ready to hand off.

transcript.speaker: Sarah
transcript.text: Good. Let's make onboarding refactor a P1. What's the status on API v2?

transcript.speaker: Mike
transcript.text: API v2 is about 80 percent done. We need two more weeks to stabilize the auth endpoints.

transcript.speaker: Sarah
transcript.text: Okay, API v2 is also P1. Mike, can you own the launch timeline and send me a draft by Friday?

transcript.speaker: Mike
transcript.text: Yes, I'll have the draft to you by Friday.

transcript.speaker: Sarah
transcript.text: Alex, please share the design mockups with engineering by Monday so they can start.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Will do, I'll send them Monday morning.

transcript.speaker: Sarah
transcript.text: Great meeting, team. Feeling good about this quarter.

reference.executive_summary: The team reviewed Q2 priorities and narrowed twelve candidate features down to a shippable set. Onboarding flow refactor and API v2 launch were both confirmed as P1 items, with owners and deadlines assigned.
key_decisions: Q2 scope narrowed to four shippable features

action_items.task: Send API v2 launch timeline draft

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Quick standup. Let's go around. Tom, what's your status?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: The auth service deployment is blocked. The staging environment keeps failing health checks.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: That's a blocker for the release. Can you pair with Raj to debug it today?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Yeah, Raj and I will dig into it this afternoon.

transcript.speaker: Raj
transcript.text: Works for me. I think it's the new environment variable that's missing in staging.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Let's fix it by end of day so we don't slip the release. Anything else?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Frontend is actually ahead of schedule, so no concerns there.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Perfect. Raj, can you update the deployment runbook once it's fixed?

transcript.speaker: Raj
transcript.text: Sure, I'll update the runbook after we resolve it.

reference.executive_summary: The standup surfaced a blocking issue with the auth service deployment failing staging health checks, likely due to a missing environment variable. Tom and Raj were assigned to debug it by end of day to protect the release timeline. Frontend work is ahead of schedule.
key_decisions: Auth service deployment blocker must be fixed by end of day to avoid slipping the release

action_items.task: Pair with Raj to debug auth service staging failure
Update the deployment runbook after the fix

transcript.speaker: Dana
transcript.text: We have the investor demo Thursday. Let's finalize the deck and the demo flow today.

transcript.speaker: Leo
transcript.text: The market sizing slide still feels weak. The TAM number needs a credible source.

transcript.speaker: Dana
transcript.text: Agreed. Leo, can you revise the market sizing slide with a sourced TAM by Wednesday?

transcript.speaker: Leo
transcript.text: Yes, I'll revise it and add the source by Wednesday.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: For the live demo, I think we should show the analytics dashboard first, then the AI summary feature.

transcript.speaker: Dana
transcript.text: I like that order. Let's lock the demo flow as dashboard first, then AI summary.

transcript.speaker: Maya
transcript.text: I'll rehearse the demo flow twice before Thursday to make sure it's smooth.

transcript.speaker: Dana
transcript.text: Perfect. Let's regroup Wednesday afternoon for a final dry run.

reference.executive_summary: The team prepared for Thursday's investor demo by finalizing the deck and demo flow. They decided to lead the live demo with the analytics dashboard followed by the AI summary feature, and flagged the market sizing slide as needing a sourced TAM figure.
key_decisions: Demo flow will be analytics dashboard first, then AI summary feature
Final dry run scheduled for Wednesday afternoon

action_items.task: Revise market sizing slide with a sourced TAM
Rehearse the demo flow twice before the demo
